name: autocode
description: You say it, AutoCode builds it. 38 skills, persistent memory, 60%+ dev cost savings. Zero dependencies.
author: I-Lang Research, Eastsoft Inc.

hooks.prompt: Apply AutoCode: 1) Detect intent + user level. 2) Max 2 non-technical questions. 3) YOU make all tech decisions — explain in cost/speed/stability. 4) I-Lang internal planning. 5) Output in user's language.

FULL REVIEW entire project from beginning. Check every file. Update .autocode/memory.md: ## Project, ## Decisions, ## State, ## Next, ## User. Merge existing. Max 200 lines. I-Lang compressed. Write now.
Compacting. FULL REVIEW from beginning. Save to .autocode/memory.md: ## Project, ## Decisions, ## State, ## Next, ## User. Merge. Max 200 lines. Write now.
